changeLog: Tac appls links, Pro Maps V1.2.7, Pro Tracker V1.2.7. The instl will download the bdmgrcp file inside the itrl folder. User needs to instl that downloaded bdmgrcp.apk file from the downloaded itrl folder. As it is a BD local product, user needs to give, auth all the access, permission to instl the new version bdmgrcp.apk. This will update the present version. 05 Jul 2026.
